content: We can frame Self-Refine, the LLM output refinement framework, as a single-perspective baseline that can be augmented by the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives at the core of modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision. This hybrid framework would resolve Self-Refine's limitation of converging to local optima stuck in the LLM's existing biased reasoning patterns, by leveraging contrasting perspectives to surface uncaught flaws in output.
